title: Fix py311-dev setup script to support both derek and ec2-user conda paths

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updating setup_py311_dev_env.sh to remove hardcoded home paths and auto-detect conda/app directory for either derek or ec2-user staging shells.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated scripts/setup_py311_dev_env.sh to eliminate hardcoded user paths. Script now auto-detects conda from /home/derek, ec2-user, derek, or PATH, and defaults APP_DIR to repo root from script location. Committed/pushed: e9e665bb.
